Event.title: Event
Event.description: Represents an adventure event or activity offered by Alpina Adventures.

title.description: The title of the event (e.g., 'Mountain Climbing Expedition').

description.description: Detailed description of the event, including itinerary and difficulty.

imageUrl.description: URL of the main image representing the event.

location.description: The location where the event takes place.

date.description: The date and time of the event.

duration.description: The duration of the event (e.g., '3 days', '4 hours').

price.description: The price of the event per participant.

capacity.description: The maximum number of participants allowed for the event.

RegistrationForm.title: RegistrationForm
RegistrationForm.description: Represents a registration form associated with an event.

id.description: Unique identifier for the registration form.

title.description: The title of the registration form (e.g., 'Climbing Registration').

fields.description: Array of fields in the registration form.

enabled.description: Indicates whether the registration form is currently enabled for use.

UserRegistration.title: UserRegistration
UserRegistration.description: Represents a user's registration for a specific event.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user registration.

registrationDate.description: The date and time when the user registered for the event.

formData.description: JSON string containing the form data submitted by the user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user profile.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

phone.description: The phone number of the user.

ContentBlock.title: ContentBlock
ContentBlock.description: Represents a reusable content block that can be displayed on various pages.

id.description: Unique identifier for the content block.

title.description: The title of the content block (e.g., 'About Us', 'Contact Information').

content.description: The HTML content of the content block.

type.description: The type of the content block (e.g., 'text', 'image', 'video').

definition.description: Stores event details. Admin only access.
Stores registration form definitions. Admin only access.

params.name: registrationFormId
params.description: Unique identifier for the registration form.

definition.description: Stores user registrations for specific events.  Allows listing of registrations scoped to an event. Admin only access.

params.name: userRegistrationId
params.description: Unique identifier for the user registration.

definition.description: Stores user profile information. Admin only access.

params.name: userProfileId
params.description: Unique identifier for the user profile.

definition.description: Stores reusable content blocks for the CMS. Admin only access.

params.name: contentBlockId
params.description: Unique identifier for the content block.

definition.description: Presence of document indicates admin role. Existence over content.

firestore.reasoning: This Firestore structure prioritizes authorization independence and simplifies security rules by denormalizing authorization data. It focuses on path-based ownership for user-specific data and uses structural segregation to maintain a homogeneous security posture within collections. The structure supports the core features of Alpina Adventures, including event management, user registrations, and dynamic content blocks. All data is owned by admins. QAPs are supported by segregating data based on access levels. Radically consistent naming helps with maintenance.
